texto: Why is it… that temptations of the world seem to be stronger than romance? Is it because of biological imperative of reproduction
autor: so wham-bam-thank-you-ma'am has to take precedence? And your prospect Special Guy finally appears to be nothing more than cheap imitation of things that might have been?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de so wham-bam-thank-you-ma'am has to take precedence? And your prospect Special Guy finally appears to be nothing more than cheap imitation of things that might have been? que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Why is it… that temptations of the world seem to be stronger than romance? Is it because of biolo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, gina-wings, temptations, com foco em reflexao.
